name: SimpleMap
title: Simple Map

properties.name: data
properties.description: Array of records to display on the map. Same contract as SimpleChart and DataGrid.

properties.name: latitudeField
properties.description: Field name for latitude values. Defaults to __mj_Latitude for MJ geo-enabled entities.

properties.name: longitudeField
properties.description: Field name for longitude values. Defaults to __mj_Longitude for MJ geo-enabled entities.

properties.name: entityName
properties.description: Entity name for metadata-aware formatting and OpenEntityRecord integration.

properties.name: entityPrimaryKeys
properties.description: Array of primary key field names for record opening (same pattern as DataGrid).

properties.name: renderMode
properties.description: Map rendering mode: 'point' for individual markers with clustering, 'heatmap' for density circles via spatial clustering, 'choropleth' for GeoJSON country polygons loaded from MJ: Countries entity.

properties.name: clusterMarkers
properties.description: Enable marker clustering in point mode via L.markerClusterGroup when available.

properties.name: clusterRadius
properties.description: Radius in degrees for spatial clustering in heatmap mode. Larger values produce fewer, larger clusters.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Optional map title displayed above the map.

properties.name: popupFields
properties.description: Field names to show in marker popup. Auto-detects from entity metadata if omitted.

properties.name: center
properties.description: Initial map center as { lat, lng }. Auto-fits to data bounds if omitted.

properties.name: zoom
properties.description: Initial zoom level (1-18). Auto-fits to data if omitted.

properties.name: colors
properties.description: Custom color palette for choropleth regions. Array of hex color strings.

properties.name: countryField
properties.description: Field name used to group records by country in choropleth mode.

properties.name: maxPopupRecords
properties.description: Maximum number of records to show as clickable links in cluster/region popups before showing 'and X more...' overflow text.

events.name: onMarkerClick
events.description: Fired when a map marker or popup record link is clicked. In point mode, clicking a marker or its popup link triggers this. Calls callbacks.OpenEntityRecord when entityName and entityPrimaryKeys are provided.

parameters.name: record
parameters.description: The data record associated with the marker

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: Composite primary key string (fields joined by ||)

events.name: onRegionClick
events.description: Fired when a choropleth region polygon or heatmap density circle is clicked. Emits all records within that region/cluster.

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Region or cluster name (country name or 'Cluster (N records)')

parameters.name: records
parameters.description: All records within the clicked region

parameters.name: groupBy
parameters.description: Grouping level: 'country' for choropleth, 'state_province' for heatmap clusters

parameters.name: count
parameters.description: Number of records in the region

events.name: onMapRendered
events.description: Fired after the map finishes rendering markers, heatmap circles, or choropleth polygons.

parameters.name: markerCount
parameters.description: Number of records with valid coordinates rendered

parameters.name: bounds
parameters.description: Map bounds as { north, south, east, west }

exampleUsage: React.createElement(SimpleMap, { data: records, entityName: 'Organizations', entityPrimaryKeys: ['ID'], renderMode: 'choropleth', height: 500, utilities: utilities, callbacks: callbacks })
